title: Don't Want to Give AI Agents Your Logins? Here's How to Avoid It With 1Password for Claude
summary: You'll need 1Password for Mac (version 8.12.28 or later), 1Password browser extension (version 8.12.28 or later), the Claude desktop app , and the Claude browser extension.
